summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DPM Beauty Pageant 2026 landing page. All major features tested including backend APIs, frontend UI, 3-step application form, and integrations.

ui_bugs.issue: Terms & Conditions checkbox requires force click due to sticky navigation/footer overlay interception
ui_bugs.workaround: Force click or JavaScript click works

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections
Hero section with Urvashi Rautela image
Celebrity patron section with Urvashi image
Categories section with 4 categories and 'Most Popular' badge
Application form 3-step flow (Personal Details -> Review -> Payment)
Thank you page after payment simulation
